_description: Test vectors for the CLI update-check semver comparison and tag filtering. Generated from spec/v1/cli.md § Update Check and Self-Update.

semver_compare._description: should_update is true when latest > current. Both inputs are bare semver strings (no leading 'v', no 'cli/v' prefix).

valid.description: double-digit patch should not be greater than minor bump
double-digit patch is greater than single-digit
double-digit minor is greater than single-digit
stable is greater than its rc
rc is not greater than its stable

invalid.reason: leading 'v' prefix not allowed in bare semver string
build metadata not supported in this revision

release_tag_filter._description: Which GitHub release tags the CLI's GitHub-direct fallback (and the server poller) should accept. Tags MUST match ^cli/v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$ exactly. Drafts and prereleases are skipped. Server-tagged releases are skipped.

valid.reason: tag does not match strict semver pattern (no -suffix allowed)

banner_suppression._description: Conditions under which the implicit update-check banner MUST be suppressed. expected_banner is true if the banner SHOULD be emitted, false if suppressed.

cases.scenario: stdout is binary data piped to non-TTY (e.g. secrt get -o -)
stderr is not a TTY (redirected to file, captured by CI logger, piped)
server returned latest_cli_version: null and local cache is empty
server below min_supported_cli_version (banner replaced with stronger msg)

channel_reservation._description: The --channel flag and update_channel config key are reserved in this revision. Implementations MUST parse them for forward compatibility but MUST NOT change behavior beyond the documented stable-only policy.

invalid.reason: reserved-not-implemented; CLI MUST hard-error in this revision
reserved-not-implemented; CLI MUST hard-error or treat as stable in this revision
